creator: mi@video-collage.com
text:
Man-pages are installed into the usual places AND into
	${PREFIX}/share/doc/samba/manpages/ -- kind of wasteful.

	Also, the configure fails with KRB5, which is really a problem
	with krb5 port, I think -- the libraries it installs have
	unresolved symbols, but do not themselves say which other
	libraries (rsa ?) they need.

How-To-Repeat: 
	Try configuring the port with krb5 installed.

	Without the krb5 it builds fine, but installs the man pages into
	two different locations.
